violations.text: Ice builded up observed underneath condensor located in the walk-in freezer area. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the fans in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent buildup of residue. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024

Old floor pipes observed sealed with foam. The area observed with an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The materials observed to be not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Materials for floors shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was obstructed by a frozen dessert machine and coffee machine being in too close proximity. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

The hand washing sink in the drive-thru line was observed being used as a dump sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. PIC instructed to pour sanitizer by hand and measure with test strip until dispensing unit is serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024
The guard/plate inside of the ice machine was in poor repair (cracked down the middle). New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024
